runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "C++", "build_system": "cmake", "package_manager": "apt", "build_commands": ["mkdir -p build", "cd build && cmake ..", "cd build && make -j$(nproc)"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update", "apt-get install -y build-essential cmake libsdl2-dev pkg-config"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "C++11", "system_packages": []}, "repo_type": "native_application", "base_image": "debian:oldstable-slim", "base_image_rationale": "A minimal Debian-based image with apt and essential build tools suitable for compiling a CMake + SDL2 project.", "pitfalls": ["FindSDL2 relies on system libs; ensure libsdl2-dev is installed in the image.", "Older toolchains in oldstable-slim might slightly vary in C++ standard support; the project requires -std=c++11.", "SDL-based GUI apps require an X server/display; running headless will fail without a virtual display."], "notes": "The project uses CMake to build a tinyraycaster executable with SDL2; the provided FindSDL2.cmake is used to locate SDL2. The Dockerfile in this repo installs netpbm and libsdl2-dev; this blueprint mirrors that dependency setup."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# Build from source using a two-stage Docker build for tinyraycaster

# Stage 1: builder with dev tools to compile the project
FROM debian:oldstable-slim AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies (CMake + SDL2 and common dev tools)
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     build-essential \
     cmake \
     libsdl2-dev \
     netpbm \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /src

# Copy source and build
COPY . .
RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && make -j$(nproc)

# Stage 2: runtime image
FROM debian:oldstable-slim

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install runtime dependencies (SDL2 runtime, etc.)
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     libsdl2-2.0-0 \
     netpbm \
     file \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the built binary from the builder
COPY --from=builder /src/build/tinyraycaster /tinyraycaster

WORKDIR /

# Run the application (requires a display server for SDL)
CMD ["/tinyraycaster"]

artifacts.content:
# Build from source using a two-stage Docker build for tinyraycaster

# Stage 1: builder with dev tools to compile the project
FROM debian:oldstable-slim AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies (CMake + SDL2 and common dev tools)
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     build-essential \
     cmake \
     libsdl2-dev \
     netpbm \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /src

# Copy source and build
COPY . .
RUN mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && make -j$(nproc)

# Stage 2: runtime image
FROM debian:oldstable-slim

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install runtime dependencies (SDL2 runtime, etc.)
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
     libsdl2-2.0-0 \
     netpbm \
     file \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the built binary from the builder
COPY --from=builder /src/build/tinyraycaster /tinyraycaster

WORKDIR /

# Run the application (requires a display server for SDL)
CMD ["/tinyraycaster"]
